jobs.title: Project Manager/Project Lead
jobs.jd_full:
Company Description

Founded and headquartered in Switzerland, Avaloq is continuously expanding its global footprint with around 2,500 colleagues in 12 countries, and more than 170 clients in 35 countries. We are an industry-leading provider of wealth management technology and services for financial institutions around the world, including private banks and wealth managers, investment managers, as well as retail and neo banks. Our research led approach and continual innovation is powered by the passion and creativity of our colleagues.

We are always looking for talented people to join us on our mission to orchestrate the financial ecosystem and democratize access to wealth management. Avaloq offers the opportunity to work closely with some of the world’s leading financial institutions as we jointly develop and shape careers. Championing a collaborative, supportive and flexible work environment empowers our colleagues to reach their full potential.

Job Description

We are looking for an experienced Project Manager to lead and manage core projects to our SaaS community, focusing primarily on annual software updates for banking solutions. In this role, you will be responsible for overseeing the planning, execution, and successful delivery of these projects, ensuring that the software updates are completed on time, within budget, and to the highest quality standards.  In addition to managing the core upgrade projects, you will collaborate with other Project Managers overseeing “on top” initiatives.

The ideal candidate will have a proven track record of managing projects within the banking industry and will have strong leadership, organizational, and communication skills. You will be expected to manage stakeholder relationships, provide detailed progress reports, and ensure seamless communication between teams to guarantee that all project milestones are met.

Some of our key project delivery principles are the following

  • Purpose: We enjoy what we do. We lead with energy and enthusiasm. We are committed to the organization and the role.
  • Delivery & Action: We get things done. We are creating actionable plans, and we drive and lead the day-to-day execution of the activities.
  • Solution-orientation: We identify and develop solutions. We take a holistic, proactive approach to challenges. We are logical thinkers and rigorous analysts, and above everything pragmatic .

Your key tasks

  • Manage the portfolio of projects of SaaS clients for banking software, ensuring that each solution is successfully delivered across multiple clients and within the defined timelines.
  • Manage Cross-Functional Teams: Manage technical teams, developers, and other functional departments to ensure that project goals are clearly understood and met, and that technical issues are addressed effectively.
  • Ensure Project Delivery: Oversee the end-to-end delivery of upgrade projects, ensuring that they are executed on schedule, within scope, and adhering to budget and quality standards.
  • Risk Management: Proactively identify and manage project risks, implementing mitigation strategies to ensure project success.
  • Project Planning and Reporting: Develop detailed project plans within the given framework, track milestones, and provide regular status updates to the client project managers.
  • Support cross-project initiatives: Work closely with other Project Managers to ensure smooth integration and synchronization between multiple projects running in parallel.

Qualifications

  • Good and demonstrable understanding of banking technology
  • Flexibility about work content and location, willingness to spend time in our offices in Zurich, Bioggio and Geneva
  • Good organizational skills ensuring success in delivery through planning, executing, progress reporting, controlling, reporting and monitoring of the project activities
  • Excellent communication skills to foster relationships with clients and team members alike, on all seniority levels
  • Problem solving attitude and proactive approach
  • Resilience to stress
  • Fluent in English

It would be a real bonus if you have

  • Avaloq certification / Avaloq experience
  • PMP or equivalent project management certification is highly desirable
  • In-depth knowledge of the banking business and bank-related processes, particularly in the context of software solutions and upgrades

Additional Information

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices.

In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self.

We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way.

Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.

jobs.title: End-to-End Project Manager
jobs.jd_full:
Role Overview

We are seeking an End-to-End Project Manager to lead the execution of a large-scale IT/OT transformation and separation program. This role is intentionally non-technical, focusing on orchestration, coordination, and execution rather than deep technical expertise. The ideal candidate excels at translating complex technical discussions into clear, actionable plans, ensuring alignment across multiple technical teams and stakeholders. This role will be a combination of remote and on-site work, depending on project and client needs. The amount of on-site time will be determined by the project plan and any factors that may impact project delivery.

Key Responsibilities

  • Drive end-to-end execution across IT/OT migration workstreams
  • Translate highly technical discussions into structured plans, timelines, and deliverables
  • Facilitate cross-functional meetings and ensure clear outcomes and accountability
  • Manage dependencies, risks, and escalations across multiple teams
  • Maintain alignment between business stakeholders and technical teams
  • Ensure milestones and deliverables are achieved on time and within scope
  • Develop and maintain project plans, status reports, and executive communications

Required Qualifications

  • 8+ years of experience in Project Management, preferably in large transformation programs
  • Proven ability to manage highly technical initiatives without deep technical involvement
  • Strong facilitation and communication skills across diverse stakeholder groups
  • Exceptional organizational and execution capabilities
  • Experience managing global, cross-functional teams
  • Strong problem-solving and decision-making skills
  • Language Requirement: Advanced / Fluent English (mandatory)

Preferred Experience

  • Experience in IT/OT environments, manufacturing, or system migrations
  • Exposure to separation, carve-out, or divestiture programs
  • Familiarity with structured project management methodologies (PMI, Agile, hybrid)

jobs.jd_full:
Why should you join dLocal?
dLocal enables the biggest companies in the world to collect payments in 40 countries in emerging markets. Global brands rely on us to increase conversion rates and simplify payment expansion effortlessly. As both a payments processor and a merchant of record where we operate, we make it possible for our merchants to make inroads into the world’s fastest-growing, emerging markets. 
 
By joining us you will be a part of an amazing global team that makes it all happen. Being a part of dLocal means working with 1000+ teammates from 30+ different nationalities and developing an international career that impacts millions of people’s daily lives. We are builders, we never run from a challenge, we are customer-centric, and if this sounds like you, we know you will thrive in our team.
What will I be doing?
Strategy & P&L Ownership : Own the vision, strategy, and P&L for Pix, driving the economic behavior and profitability of the product. Regulatory & Compliance Leadership : Navigate the Central Bank of Brazil’s regulatory landscape (including CADOC reporting) to ensure dLocal operates as a best-in-class participant. Merchant Communication at Scale : Act as a key technical and business advisor for our global merchants, explaining complex concepts in a foreign language. Tailor-Made Solutions : Lead the discovery and delivery of bespoke Pix solutions designed for the specific needs of elite B2B partners. Innovation & AI Integration : Actively research and implement AI-driven optimizations using tools like Claude to automate operations and scale product delivery. Engineering Partnership : Partner deeply with Engineering on event-driven systems, data pipelines, and high-availability architecture.

What skills do I need?
Experience : 5+ years of PM experience in payments, fintech, or core banking. Direct experience with Brazil’s instant payment ecosystem (Pix) is mandatory. B2B Background : Proven track record in the B2B payments space, managing products for large-scale enterprise merchants. Pix Expertise : Expert knowledge of BCB regulations, Pix Features, and the broader Brazilian financial system. Technical Fluency : Deep understanding of API design, messaging queues, and the technical infrastructure required for real-time settlement. AI Adopter : High proficiency in navigating multiple AI tools (e.g., Claude) to enhance productivity and product quality. Data-Driven : Proficient with Data Analysis tools to analyze performance and economic behaviors. Communication : Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal) are a must for high-touch merchant interaction. Fluency in Spanish is highly preferred.

What do we offer? 
 
Besides the tailored benefits we have for each country, dLocal will help you thrive and go that extra mile by offering you:
- Flexibility: we have flexible schedules and we are driven by performance.
- Fintech industry: work in a dynamic and ever-evolving environment, with plenty to build and boost your creativity.
- Referral bonus program: our internal talents are the best recruiters - refer someone ideal for a role and get rewarded.
- Social budget: you'll get a monthly budget to chill out with your team (in person or remotely) and deepen your connections!
- dLocal Houses: want to rent a house to spend one week anywhere in the world coworking with your team? We’ve got your back!
 
Flexibility in how you work: We focus on impact and productivity over fixed hours. This means our teams have flexible schedules and, depending on your role and location, you will combine self‑managed focus time with moments of in‑person connection in our collaboration hubs.
 
 
What happens after you apply?
Our Talent Acquisition team is invested in creating the best candidate experience possible, so don’t worry, you will definitely hear from us. We will review your CV and keep you posted by email at every step of the process!
 
Also, you can check out our webpage, Linkedin and Youtube for more about dLocal!
